C:\Users\sebas\lean-time-horizon\tmp\lt-005-zll0olax\PinCheck.lean:5:7: error: Type mismatch
  projectCap_le_cap
has type
  ∀ (cap x : Nat), x ≤ cap → projectCap cap x ≤ cap
but is expected to have type
  ∀ (cap x : Nat), projectCap cap x ≤ cap
projectCap_idempotent : ∀ (cap x : Nat), projectCap cap (projectCap cap x) = projectCap cap x

  projectCap 5 12
is not definitionally equal to the right-hand side
  5

⊢ projectCap 5 12 = 5
